android.widget.TextView.text: Dear Mentors/Faculty members, Please find attached the list of students for Placement training. To help them perform well in the Group Discussion and interview rounds, an exclusive training session has been arranged for the shortlisted students from June 18, 2026, to June 20, 2026, between 8:00 a.m. and 11:00 a.m in T16- W03- F05- R08 Kindly ensure that the students attend all the training sessions without fail.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text:
Dear faculty members/mentors,
The students whose names are listed in the attached PDF are required to attend the Placement Training Program (Technical, Aptitude and Soft Skills) on 18 June 2026 and 19 June 2026 from 3:00 PM to 4:30 PM.
Kindly ensure their presence during the scheduled sessions and encourage them to attend without fail so that they can reap the maximum benefit from the training.
Thank you for your support and cooperation.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
